text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 351 

PRE_ICL_INP_COPAY_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL In-Network Pharmacy Copay for other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary copay amount for a day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1- or 
3- months) on this tier, using an in-network pharmacy during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase 
of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
